response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified on-screen text "君にしか読めない手紙" and "風真いろは" as the performer.
2. Searched for '"君にしか読めない手紙" 風真いろは 日本語 and English lyrics' using DuckDuckGo.
3. Extracted song lyrics from the search results, noting that HoneyWorks is the composer.
4. Mapped the performance into 4 sequential scenes for the final structure.
response.global_summary: A live performance by Hololive VTuber Kazama Iroha of her original song "Kimi ni shika yomenai tegami". The video features a 3D stage performance with background screen graphics and concludes with promotional outro cards.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs the song "Kimi ni shika yomenai tegami" on a 3D stage. Song title and artist information are displayed on-screen.
scenes.song_title: 君にしか読めない手紙
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ありがとう書くとしたら 毎日になっちゃうくらい
重すぎる私の想いは 最後に伝えるね lalala
拝啓 私を形作った君へ
相も変わらず言葉を 届け続けています lalala
拝啓 未来で私待ってる君へ
響く音に憂いなどなく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If I were to write "thank you"
I'd have to write it every day
I'll tell you my feelings that are too heavy 
At the very end
Lalala
Dear you, who shaped me
I am still delivering my words to you as always
Lalala
Dear you, who are waiting for me in the future
The sound echoing has no sadness in it
